name: get_campaign_analytics
description: Retrieve performance analytics for campaigns, line items, or promoted tweets. Synchronous endpoint returns metrics like impressions, engagements, clicks, spend, video views, and conversions. Supports date range filtering and granularity options (DAY, TOTAL).

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The entity type to get stats for. Options: CAMPAIGN, LINE_ITEM, PROMOTED_TWEET.

parameters.name: entity_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entity IDs to get stats for.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the analytics period in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the analytics period in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Time granularity for the data. Options: DAY, TOTAL.

parameters.name: metric_groups
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of metric groups to retrieve. Options: ENGAGEMENT, BILLING, VIDEO, WEB_CONVERSION, MOBILE_CONVERSION, MEDIA.
